programme.title: Abandoned Engineering: Season 13
programme.desc: There are many engineering projects in the world that have been abandoned for various reasons.The creators of the program present the stories of these structures and the people who created them.Behind each of them there is a fascinating and unique story.Viewers will discover the most spectacular examples of abandoned buildings from around the globe, including an underground Nazi base in France, designed to attack London, and a secret Japanese facility.We will find out why they were created and what led to their fall.

programme.title: Yukon Rescue
programme.desc: Rescuers in Dawson City battle avalanches, fires and floods.The volunteer fire brigade struggles with, among other things, lack of supplies, extreme temperatures and harsh nature.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: The 11th series of a series whose creators try to solve the mysteries of the biggest plane crashes.Thanks to the opinions of experts and eyewitness accounts, the events before the tragedy will be recreated.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of the plane crash that was flying from Bogota to San Andrés Island.The pilots battled a powerful tropical storm.They assumed they would be able to leave the bad weather area before reaching their destination.Unfortunately, due to strong winds and heavy rain, the plane crashed while approaching landing.The crew maintained from the beginning that the accident was caused by bad weather conditions.However, investigators are analyzing all possible scenarios.They come to the conclusion that humans are to blame.A wrong assessment of the situation contributed to the tragic event.

programme.title: Seconds from Disaster
programme.desc: On November 26, 2008, at 9:20 p.m., armed attackers broke into the Oberoi Trident Hotel in Mumbai and started shooting at people.Around the same time, an attack was carried out on the Nariman House religious center.The targets of subsequent attacks were the popular tourist bar Cafe Leopold, the luxurious Taj Mahal Palace hotel and one of the most crowded railway stations in the world - CST.Unprecedented sabotage attacks cost the lives of 166 people.They targeted both Indians and Western tourists.Viewers will learn about the shortcomings that allowed ten terrorists to take over the largest Indian city and murder people with impunity for three days in front of the whole world.

programme.title: Seconds from Disaster 6
programme.desc: A reminder of the greatest disasters of our times.The program includes, among others:transport accidents, building collapses and terrorist attacks.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: The series' creators solve the mysteries of the biggest plane crashes.Trying to recreate the events that took place before the tragedies, they reconstruct the preceding situations on board the machines.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of air accidents in recent years.Each episode will present a reconstruction of the events that led to the tragedy.The stories are supplemented by reports from experts and eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans 6
programme.desc: The sea depths hide many secrets.Scientists can unravel further mysteries thanks to groundbreaking research and modern technologies.Viewers can expect exciting expeditions to the underwater world.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Professor Hannah Fry sets off on a journey around the world.He will visit Spain, Vietnam, Greece, South Korea, Ireland and Iceland.You will admire stunning landscapes and bustling cities.

programme.title: Inside Airport Lost \u0026 Found
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of the work of the lost and found office.Search teams make every effort to return the most surprising lost items to travelers.These include artificial eyes, luxury watches and ritual robes.

programme.title: Toronto Airport Uncovered
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of the operation of the largest airport in Canada.Viewers will see how the staff ensures traffic flows during record snowfall and negative temperatures.

programme.title: Frontlines
programme.desc: Various terrains and conditions in which soldiers had to fight on the fronts of World War II: from North Africa to northern Europe, from the Mediterranean Sea to the Pacific.

programme.title: To Catch A Smuggler 5
programme.desc: It is estimated that 124 million people fly to the United States every year.Among them are smugglers and criminals.Employees of the US Department of Homeland Security are tracking them and protecting the border.

programme.title: Border Protection Spain
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of the work of units guarding the Spanish coast.Highly trained professionals have modern equipment.They fight drug smuggling and illegal emigration.

credits.actor: Self - Biologist at Palma Aquarium Foundation - Xisca

programme.title: Ancient Worlds Revealed with Albert Lin
programme.desc: Doctor Albert Lin follows the secrets of ancient civilizations.In Asia he will see a forbidden zone in Mongolia.He will also look for answers to the question of how Petra was built.

programme.title: Otchłań: Powstanie i upadek nazizmu
programme.desc: Using previously unpublished archival materials and citing historical sources, an international team of experts presents a new image of Adolf Hitler's rule.

programme.title: Nazi Megastructures: Battle Ready
programme.desc: Profiles of engineers responsible for the construction of the most dangerous military facilities.Their works contributed to the technological revolution.The figures of Heinrich Himmler and Joseph Goebbels, who were completely devoted to Hitler, will also be introduced.The Führer assigned them the task of building the Nazi social machine.The program will also discuss the attack on the Soviet Union and the failure of total war tactics.You will be able to learn about the creation of the battleships Bismarck and Tirpitz, as well as the bunkers intended to protect submarines.In addition, the creators will talk about the conflict in the Pacific and the largest floating fortress armed with powerful guns.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation 23
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of the most famous accidents in recent years.Each episode will present a reconstruction of the events that led to the tragedy.The stories are complemented by reports from aviation experts.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation 21
programme.desc: Reconstructions of real plane crashes.By recreating the course of events, the program's creators try to understand what led to the unfortunate events.They recreate the circumstances in which the tragedy occurred: the weather, the atmosphere on board the plane, the decisions and actions of the pilots.They also show the work of people investigating the causes of disasters and conduct a computer flight simulation.Viewers can hear various comments from specialists and testimonies of witnesses to these events.The creators of the program will prove that air accidents are often caused by human slowness and lack of imagination.Each disaster is thoroughly analyzed and the lessons learned help minimize the number of tragedies in the future.

programme.title: Seconds from Disaster 6
programme.desc: A reminder of the greatest disasters of our times.The program includes, among others:transport accidents, building collapses and terrorist attacks.

programme.title: Seconds from Disaster 6
programme.desc: On October 3, 1993, US special forces stormed a building near Mogadishu, Somalia, to capture important members of the Mohamed Farrah Aidid clan.Theoretically a simple mission turned into a day-and-night battle in which eighteen commandos and over five hundred Somali civilians lost their lives.The authors of the program, with the help of participants of those fights and the former American ambassador to Somalia, Robert Oakley, investigate the causes of the tactical and strategic defeat.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: The series' creators solve the mysteries of the biggest plane crashes.Trying to recreate the events that took place before the tragedies, they reconstruct the preceding situations on board the machines.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of air accidents in recent years.Each episode will present a reconstruction of the events that led to the tragedy.The stories are supplemented by reports from experts and eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans 6
programme.desc: The sea depths hide many secrets.Scientists can unravel further mysteries thanks to groundbreaking research and modern technologies.Viewers can expect exciting expeditions to the underwater world.

programme.desc: Professor Hannah Fry sets off on a journey around the world.He will visit Spain, Vietnam, Greece, South Korea, Ireland and Iceland.You will admire stunning landscapes and bustling cities.

programme.desc: Behind the scenes of the work of the lost and found office.Search teams make every effort to return the most surprising lost items to travelers.These include artificial eyes, luxury watches and ritual robes.

programme.desc: Behind the scenes of the operation of the largest airport in Canada.Viewers will see how the staff ensures traffic flows during record snowfall and negative temperatures.

programme.desc: Various terrains and conditions in which soldiers had to fight on the fronts of World War II: from North Africa to northern Europe, from the Mediterranean Sea to the Pacific.

programme.desc: Profiles of engineers responsible for the construction of the most dangerous military facilities.Their works contributed to the technological revolution.The figures of Heinrich Himmler and Joseph Goebbels, who were completely devoted to Hitler, will also be introduced.The Führer assigned them the task of building the Nazi social machine.The program will also discuss the attack on the Soviet Union and the failure of total war tactics.You will be able to learn about the creation of the battleships Bismarck and Tirpitz, as well as the bunkers intended to protect submarines.In addition, the creators will talk about the conflict in the Pacific and the largest floating fortress armed with powerful guns.
